check_audio_device.title: Check audio output device
check_audio_device.description: Verifying that a valid audio output device is available and configured.

show_device_issue.title: Audio device issue detected
show_device_issue.description: There appears to be a problem with the audio output device. Check that your audio device is connected and selected as the default output in macOS System Settings > Sound.

check_audio_driver.title: Check Wine audio driver
check_audio_driver.description: Verifying the Wine audio driver configuration in the registry.

fix_audio_driver.title: Configure Wine audio driver
fix_audio_driver.description: Setting the Wine audio driver to the recommended value for macOS compatibility.

check_audio_buffer.title: Check DirectSound buffer settings
check_audio_buffer.description: Checking the DirectSound buffer size in the Wine registry. An incorrect buffer size can cause crackling or latency.

fix_buffer_size.title: Adjust DirectSound buffer size
fix_buffer_size.description: Setting the DirectSound buffer to the recommended size to reduce audio crackling and latency.

check_sample_rate.title: Check audio sample rate
check_sample_rate.description: Verifying that the system audio sample rate is compatible with Wine audio output.

show_sample_rate_info.title: Sample rate mismatch
show_sample_rate_info.description: The system audio sample rate may not be compatible with Wine. Try changing the sample rate in macOS Audio MIDI Setup to 44100 Hz or 48000 Hz.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the audio problem?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program again to check whether sound is working correctly.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated audio checks have not resolved the issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The audio issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.
